name: @modelcontextprotocol/server-waiting-room
description: Waiting Room MCP App Server example using React

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && npx esbuild server.ts --bundle --packages=external --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js && npx esbuild main.ts --bundle --packages=external --platform=node --format=esm --external:./server.js --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" --outfile=dist/index.js
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run watch" "npm run serve"
